articles.title: Bearish Signal: Bitcoin Miners Dump 7,700 BTC In One Week
articles.description: Bitcoin miners are usually some of the longest holders of BTC but that is usually when the bull market is in full swing and they do not have to worry about cash flow. Currently, the cash flow on bitcoin miners has plummeted and as the price of the digital asset continues to trend low, bitcoin miners have been put in a tight spot. In response, the miners have taken to dumping their coins in...

Decentralized Credit Scores: Polygon Looks to Disrupt Market With Its New Identity System
articles.description: Decentralized credit scores: Determining a user’s credit score in the decentralized web isn’t always an easy thing to do. That's because privacy is embedded as a key tenet of the crypto industry. So, lenders have had to use such things as on-chain transactions and observable off-chain activities to measure creditworthiness.
